phase-plan.purpose: Align Space Explorer authoring outputs with a portable content-pack contract that engine/runtime consumers can validate and generate code from.
phase-plan.scope: Add a `content-pack.manifest.v1` contract derived from bundle `spaceVectors`, emit manifest/schema/codegen artifacts in release scripts and CI uploads, attach authoritative pack binding in play-report API, and improve authoring defaults (what can be improved: canonical visibility, UX compactness, and maintenance through single-source contract generation).

file.description: Manifest contract types and builder from bundle payloads.
Embed manifest in reports and expose canonical asset summary counts.
Include content bindings in generated bundle and return manifest with bundle response.
Return authoritative pack binding from local bundle when report binding is absent.
Send content bindings during bundle build and update defaults with stamina/mana stats.
Emit manifest, schema bundle, and TS/C++/C# model stubs from bundle inputs.
Upload manifest/schema/codegen artifacts in docs-browser CI.
Include generated TS/C++/C# stubs in release artifact uploads.
